case_title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP. vs. GORDON, PAULA et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP.
